job_id.description: Identifier for the anomaly detection job.

desc.description: If true, the results are sorted in descending order.

end.description: Returns influencers with timestamps earlier than this time. The default value means it is unset and results are not limited to specific timestamps.

exclude_interim.description: If true, the output excludes interim results. By default, interim results are included.

influencer_score.description: Returns influencers with anomaly scores greater than or equal to this value.

from.description: Skips the specified number of influencers.

size.description: Specifies the maximum number of influencers to obtain.

sort.description: Specifies the sort field for the requested influencers. By default, the influencers are sorted by the `influencer_score` value.

start.description: Returns influencers with timestamps after this time. The default value means it is unset and results are not limited to specific timestamps.

page.description: Configures pagination. This parameter has the `from` and `size` properties.

from.description: Skips the specified number of items.

size.description: Specifies the maximum number of items to obtain.
